title: trichoneura mollis
intro: Trichoneura mollis, also known as Soft Club Moss, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the lycopod family and is native to certain regions of the world. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a demulcent and anti-inflammatory, making it useful in treating skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Trichoneura mollis include its potential to soothe and protect mucous membranes, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing. Trichoneura mollis can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and topical creams, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a range of applications.
